# raceweekend.co
# Last updated: 2026-03-20

Race Weekend is an F1 and MotoGP 2026 travel guide covering all 46 races (24 F1 + 22 MotoGP).

## Site Purpose

Comprehensive race weekend travel platform for motorsport fans attending races in person. Provides session schedules, curated local experiences, ticket information, city travel guides, and shareable itineraries.

## Content Coverage

- 24 Formula 1 2026 race destinations
- 22 MotoGP 2026 Grand Prix destinations
- Per-race content: schedule, experiences, tickets, travel guide, getting there, where to stay, insider tips

## Key Page Types

### Series Calendars
- /f1 — Full F1 2026 season calendar (24 rounds)
- /motogp — Full MotoGP 2026 Grand Prix calendar (22 rounds)

### Race Hub Pages
- /f1/[race-slug] — F1 race overview with schedule, experiences, and travel info
- /motogp/[race-slug] — MotoGP race overview

### Sub-pages (per race)
- /[series]/[race-slug]/schedule — Full session timetable (practice, qualifying, race times)
- /[series]/[race-slug]/experiences — Curated local activities and tours near the circuit
- /[series]/[race-slug]/guide — Comprehensive city travel guide
- /[series]/[race-slug]/tickets — Race weekend ticket listings and prices
- /[series]/[race-slug]/getting-there — Transport options and directions to the circuit
- /[series]/[race-slug]/where-to-stay — Best hotels and neighborhoods near the circuit
- /[series]/[race-slug]/tips — Race weekend tips and circuit facts
- /[series]/[race-slug]/travel-guide — Long-form travel guide with experiences, hotels, tips

### Tools
- /itinerary — Build and share custom race weekend itineraries

## Sitemap
https://raceweekend.co/sitemap.xml

## Contact
hello@raceweekend.co
